data.name: Yorda's Quest: A Lighthearted Magic Fantasy RPG
data.detailed_description:
The Demon Lord Veral has returned after being sealed away for 300 years... Legend tells of a hero who will come to save the world in its darkest hour, but there's just one problem: the world's been at peace for 300 years! Everyone forgot how to fight! And so, it's up to Yorda, a simple farmer with delusions of grandeur, to respond to the kingdom's call and rise up! Join him as he meets quirky characters and fights all manner of goofy monsters as he makes his way to becoming the hero of his dreams! From a farmer of crops to a farmer of EXP, Yorda departs!

Embark on a light-hearted romp through a fantasy landscape! Explore roads, caves, mountains, ruins... and maybe even an active volcano! Gain moves from story events and build your party into one capable of taking on even the nastiest demons around!

Quick Turn-based Fantasy RPG Gameplay!

You'll have to be as quick as Yorda's own speed stat if you wanna survive in this world!

Hilarious, Parody-Packed Script!

Shoot fire at rocks! Curse the younger generations! Ponder loudly why you can't just hit up a weapons shop in each new town!
data.about_the_game:
The Demon Lord Veral has returned after being sealed away for 300 years... Legend tells of a hero who will come to save the world in its darkest hour, but there's just one problem: the world's been at peace for 300 years! Everyone forgot how to fight! And so, it's up to Yorda, a simple farmer with delusions of grandeur, to respond to the kingdom's call and rise up! Join him as he meets quirky characters and fights all manner of goofy monsters as he makes his way to becoming the hero of his dreams! From a farmer of crops to a farmer of EXP, Yorda departs!

Embark on a light-hearted romp through a fantasy landscape! Explore roads, caves, mountains, ruins... and maybe even an active volcano! Gain moves from story events and build your party into one capable of taking on even the nastiest demons around!

Quick Turn-based Fantasy RPG Gameplay!

You'll have to be as quick as Yorda's own speed stat if you wanna survive in this world!

Hilarious, Parody-Packed Script!

Shoot fire at rocks! Curse the younger generations! Ponder loudly why you can't just hit up a weapons shop in each new town!
data.short_description: Laughs and legends await you! Join Yorda, the country bumpkin with hopes of heroism, on a light-hearted romp through the land! Fight demons, gain friends, and yuk it up in this parody of classic RPGs!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Gold-Mon , All Rights Reserved.
